speaker: speaker1
text: I should tell you that I'm checking out in about 30 minutes .

speaker: speaker2
text: I'm ready when you are , sir .

speaker: speaker1
text: Very good ! Now , it's still morning here in New York .

speaker: speaker2
text: You are so right , sir . The clock just struck nine .

speaker: speaker1
text: I'm going to spend some time exploring the city . What can I do with my luggage ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Sir , right here we have a storage site . Its only $ 5 an hour , but you need to leave a deposit .

speaker: speaker1
text: A deposit ? Isn't my luggage a deposit ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I'm sorry , sir , but it isn't . Your MasterCard or VISA will take care of things nicely .

speaker: speaker1
text: Okay . Let me think about this .

speaker: speaker2
text: Okay , sir . But don't take too long . You only have 30 minutes .
